citation.title: On G-birational rigidity of projective spaces

data.abstract: In this paper, we study finite subgroups $G\subset\mathrm{Aut}(\mathbb{P}^n)$ such that $\mathbb{P}^n$ is $G$-birationally rigid. For each $n\geqslant 3$, we prove that $\mathrm{Aut}(\mathbb{P}^n)$ contains at most finitely many such subgroups up to conjugation. For $n=4$, we prove that $\mathbb{P}^4$ is $G$-birationally superrigid if $G\simeq\mathrm{PSp}_{4}(\mathbf{F}_3)$.
